stemHtml: After landing and heavy manual braking, the pilots have a very short turnaround time. What must be taken into consideration?

options.a: If cooling time is not considered, this could cause the fuse plugs of the wheel to melt and pop out during the taxi for departure.
options.b: If cooling time is not considered, this could lead to an explosive failure of the brakes.
options.c: NO ACTION is required, because brakes are not used during a take-off.
options.d: NO ACTION required, because modern brakes cool down rapidly.
